EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IAssociationObject

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that specify the properties of a utility network association object.

[Guid("6D76A607-8604-4C66-BC8D-E92E04BD92E1")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IAssociationObject

Properties

AssociationType

Returns the type of association.

esriUtilityNetworkAssociationType AssociationType { get; set; }

Property Value

esriUtilityNetworkAssociationType

Examples

Sample Snippet

ErrorCode

Returns the association record errorCode.

long ErrorCode { get; set; }

Property Value

long

Examples

Sample Snippet

ErrorMessage

Returns the association record error message.

string ErrorMessage { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

FromFeatureID

Returns the from feature Global ID.

Guid FromFeatureID { get; set; }

Property Value

Guid

Examples

Sample Snippet

FromSourceID

Returns the from feature source ID.

int FromSourceID { get; set; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

FromTerminalID

Returns the from feature terminal ID if applicable.

int FromTerminalID { get; set; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

Geometry

Returns the association geometry.

IGeometry Geometry { get; set; }

Property Value

IGeometry

Examples

Sample Snippet

GlobalID

Returns the association record Global ID. This replaces the AssociationID property.

Guid GlobalID { get; set; }

Property Value

Guid

Sample Snippet

Returns the association record isContentVisible.

bool IsContentVisible { get; set; }

bool

Returns the association record Object ID.

long ObjectID { get; set; }

long

Returns the association record percent along.

double PercentAlong { get; set; }

double

Returns the association record status.

int Status { get; set; }

int
